creator: codellaspa4@gmail.com
text:
With over 10 years of experience, I am a professional body masseuse in Bangalore. My passion for healing and wellness has led me to specialize in various forms of massage therapy including Swedish, deep tissue, aromatherapy, and prenatal massages. In addition to my technical skills, I have also completed extensive training in anatomy and physiology to ensure that all treatments are tailored to meet the specific needs of each client. 

https://www.codellaspa.com
